summary: İlan Tasarım (Listing Design) admin page testing completed. Fixed 403 permission error by adding missing route rule to adminRbac.js. All backend endpoints working (GET/PUT admin, GET public). Admin page loads correctly with 8 sections/blocks. Web ilan-ver flow uses admin config.

issues: Console warnings about span/option nesting in select elements (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Missing route rule for /admin/site-design/listing in adminRbac.js caused 403 error
test_credentials: Admin: admin@platform.com / Admin123!, User: user@platform.com / User123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: İlan Tasarım admin page at /admin/site-design/listing now works. The page manages listing creation flow configuration with 3 main steps (Module Grid, Category Selection, 8-block Form). Backend endpoints tested: GET/PUT /api/admin/site/listing-design and GET /api/site/listing-design.

features_tested.admin_menu_visibility: PASS - İlan Tasarım visible under 'Site İç Tasarımı' section
features_tested.page_sections: PASS - 8 sections render: Module Grid, Category Search, Address Rules, Google Maps, Photo/Video, Contact, Duration, Terms
features_tested.save_button: PASS - Tümünü Kaydet button saves all configs
features_tested.web_ilan_ver_step1: PASS - /ilan-ver shows module cards from admin config (Emlak, Vasıta, Diğer)

bug_fixed.root_cause: Missing route rule in ADMIN_ROUTE_RULES array in /app/frontend/src/shared/adminRbac.js
bug_fixed.fix: Added { pattern: /^\/admin\/site-design\/listing$/, roles: ADMIN_ROLE_GROUPS.adminOnly } to adminRbac.js line 49
